steps.title: Find the x-coefficient
steps.content: The $x$-terms are $$18x-437x=-419x$$ so in $ax^2+bx+c$, the value of $b$ is $-419$.

steps.title: Ignore terms that do not affect b
steps.content: The value of $b$ is only the coefficient of the $x$ term. The $3x\cdot 19x$ product affects $a$, and the $-23\cdot 6$ product affects $c$, so the middle products decide $b$.
